rationale: The citing piece is a short commentary that cites Lee and Labroo (2004) mainly as an illustrative example of processing-fluency effects in consumer settings, including the mayonnaise-ketchup example. It appears in broad literature overviews alongside many other studies and is used to exemplify a general point about fluency and evaluation. The commentary does not build a specific argument, hypothesis, or methodological step on this particular paper beyond that background role.
